name: kannaka-staff
description: Kannaka Staff — agentic production support for the constellation. A watcher service (20+ health probes across radio/observatory/swarm/NATS/disk, a dashboard, and operator action endpoints) plus the `publish-album` release CLI that ships a new album to the live radio host. Skill teaches Claude how to run/observe the watcher, read its alerts, trigger operator actions safely, and drive an album release.
